name: Permission Race Condition During Resource Copy
description: The product, while copying or cloning a resource, does not set the resource's permissions or access control until the copy is complete, leaving the resource exposed to other spheres during the copy operation. This is a composite weakness requiring both a race condition and incorrect permission assignment.
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM[copy_resource] creates a new STORAGE[resource_copy] node that is accessible via EGRESS or EXTERNAL paths before CONTROL[set_permissions] or AUTH[access_control] has been applied to the copy
